title: Support chat Wasabi file transfer (dbg149)
description:
PipeShare support chat file upload and download now use Wasabi object storage instead of the dbg147 in-memory base64 file-offer flow. Upload picks a single file or folder (folder is zipped client-side), shows a theme-matched progress bar, and posts a file message visible to both chat participants via SSE. Screen capture (region snip) uses the same Wasabi upload path — PNG screenshots appear inline in chat for both parties; click to download with progress.

Also includes dbg148 remote-help fixes (customer no longer sees admin consent modal; admin Accept/Decline in chat) and pill-styled chat toolbar.

Storage path: chat-uploads/{tenantId}/{sessionId}/{fileId}-{filename}. Files carry a 10-day expiresAt in message metadata; expired downloads are rejected (optional lifecycle/cron cleanup can scan the prefix).

Who is affected: Horizon admins and customers on the OVH private server using PipeShare support chat. Deploy horizon-backend (Wasabi routes + remote/active guards) and client-portal static assets (dbg149). SaaS updates only via releases.html.
changeLog: Fix upload button doing nothing: file-offer only notified peer; replaced with direct Wasabi upload + chat message.
Fix screen capture: screenshots upload via Wasabi (same path as file upload) instead of legacy base64 /attachment.
Wasabi chat images show inline preview in chat; click image to download with progress bar.
Wasabi chat uploads: presign PUT init, complete message, presign GET download.
Theme-matched upload/download progress bars under chat messages.
File attachment bubbles in chat; click to confirm download.
SSE chat-message + chat-file-uploaded notify both peers when a file is shared.
dbg148 remote help: customer request flow + toolbar pill styling (included in same deploy batch).
Cache bust dbg149 (portal runtime + PipeShare manifest).
